package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for domain_errors_declared_in_handler_package: Business error types declared only in handlers instead of a reusable domain or service boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule027NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule027NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule027NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario027Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule027NegativeService, input Rule027NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
